# `buildconfig` tools

## `buildconfig.delete`

`implemented`

Delete an operator-published fragment. Requires platform_admin; audited.

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | string | yes | Operator-published fragment name to remove (e.g. kdump). |

## `buildconfig.get`

`implemented` · `read-only`

Fetch a seeded kernel-config fragment inline with sha256 and merge recipe. Auth only.

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | string | yes | The build-config fragment name to retrieve (e.g. kdump). |

## `buildconfig.list`

`implemented` · `read-only`

List build-config fragments with name, sha256, source, and description. Auth only.

## `buildconfig.set`

`implemented`

Publish/replace a build-config fragment. Requires platform_admin; audited.

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `content` | string | yes | The full kernel-config fragment text (UTF-8). |
| `description` | string | no | Optional human label; empty keeps the prior description. |
| `name` | string | yes | Fragment name (lowercase a-z0-9_-, e.g. kdump). |
